commit.message:
Quarterly company bonus pool: formula-based unlock, commission $ eligibility

Convert bonus pool from monthly/individual to quarterly/company-based model.
Pool accumulates from all sales, unlocks when team commission hits
(active reps × rep eligibility × multiplier %), splits equally among
reps who meet the individual commission threshold. Includes team leads
and trainees. All existing graphs and UI elements preserved and adapted.

Fix constructel_bridge crash on QGIS startup and localhost connection issue

- Protect initGui auto-connect with try/except to prevent QGIS crash
- Wrap post-connection steps individually so one failure doesn't block others
- Fix DEFAULT_HOST falling back to empty string when env var is set but empty
- Add _fix_saved_pg_connection to correct stale QGIS connection pointing to localhost
- Include actual host:port in error messages for easier diagnosis
- Add pg.already_configured translation key

Auto-switch to Gunicorn when running on Railway

nixpacks.toml. The __main__ block now detects Railway via

starts for local development.

commit.message:
fix: harden E2E tests against CI flakiness — reduce strict-mode violations and timing races

Specific failures this run:
- TC-SRC-04: add data-testid="bulk-delete-btn" to SourceTable bulk trigger so the
  selector never collides with per-row or dialog buttons; scope confirm click to dialog
- TC-SRC-09: filter "Failed to fetch RSC payload" / "RSC payload" from console errors
- TC-2.4-01 / TC-2.4-04: add waitForResponse() before entity combobox assertions so
  the 300 ms debounce + API round-trip are fully awaited; add .first() to options

Broad flakiness reduction across all spec files:
- Replace waitForTimeout() with waitForURL() / element assertions everywhere in events.spec.ts
- Replace waitForLoadState("networkidle") with targeted element waits
- Scope /löschen/ confirm buttons to getByRole("dialog") to survive accumulated test data
- Add .first() to locators that can match multiple elements under retry accumulation
- Extend smoke TC-07 console filter to cover Hydration (capital) and RSC payload noise

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: PCS starttijden correct converteren van CET/CEST naar UTC

PCS geeft starttijden in Europese tijd (CET/CEST). De edge function
draait in UTC waardoor tijden 1-2 uur verkeerd werden opgeslagen.
Nu wordt de juiste CET/CEST offset bepaald op basis van de racedatum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Vina Workflow (Esraa): Docker Update, Node Alignment, and Visualization Ready for Migration (#52)

* I have completed the Vina workflow (Esraa), built a new Docker image with all the required packages, and realigned the node structure to ensure consistency with the underlying rational chemistry of the docking process. I also added the visualization, please review it, and if everything looks good, it will be ready for the platform migration.

* Update proteomics to metabolomics in README

* fix: add input_files/ folder for silva pre-check compatibility

Silva v0.5.0+ requires input_files/ at the workflow root even when
dependency-free nodes (01_Receptor_Acquisition, 02_Ligand_Collection)
fetch data from external sources (PDB/PubChem) and need no local inputs.

All 6 nodes verified passing with silva headless run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update README for workflow-004 and remove stale silva run folder

commit.message:
Security: environment-controlled debug mode with production safety guard

- config.py: force DEBUG=False when RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT, FLASK_ENV, or ENV
  is set to "production" — prevents accidental debug in prod even if
  DEBUG=True is misconfigured
- whatsapp_webhook.py: use config.DEBUG instead of hardcoded debug=True,
  print debug state on startup for visibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: remove dead code, unused exports, and fix runtime bugs

Remove 1,591 lines of dead code identified by comprehensive audit:
- Delete orphaned files (week-extractor.mjs, weekday-mapper.mjs)
- Remove unused exports from parser-interfaces, enhanced-logger, data-validator
- Remove dead methods from base-parser (resetState, getConfig, updateConfig, etc.)
- Remove unused HolyGreens parser registration
- Clean up unused imports and variables in lambdas
- Remove unused test helpers and mocks from test-setup
- Remove unused deps (@vitest/ui, serverless-plugin-warmup)
- Remove unused FUNCTION_TYPE env vars from serverless.yml
- Fix runtime bugs: undefined `index` var and wrong var name in cache-manager

feat: Add JSON auto-repair with error tolerance and prepare v0.8.0 release

JSON Formatter now automatically repairs common issues like escaped strings,
trailing commas, single quotes, comments, and unquoted keys using the
anyrepair Rust crate. Shows three-state status: Valid/Repaired/Error.

commit.message:
Klassiekers-bundel: meerdere eendagskoersen als etappes in één competitie

Voegt per-stage PCS URL support toe zodat klassiekers gebundeld kunnen worden
in één competitie met een gecombineerd klassement. Elke etappe (klassieker)
heeft een eigen PCS URL voor startlijst- en resultaten-sync. Riders worden
gemerged op pcs_slug over de hele competitie.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: NV là approver không được auto-assign role MANAGER

Bug: resolveManagers() chỉ check directManagerId khi nâng EMPLOYEE→MANAGER.
NV được chỉ định làm approver (người duyệt) nhưng không phải directManager
→ role vẫn EMPLOYEE → không thấy trang duyệt giải trình.

Fix: auto-assign MANAGER cho cả directManagerId + approverId.
Áp dụng cho: parse-full-employees, parse-employees, resolve-managers API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Skill 上传接口使用原始文件名推导 skill 名称

之前 importArchive 从临时文件路径推导名称，导致 skill 目录带有
"skill-upload-XXXXXXXX-" 前缀。现在 HTTP 上传时传入原始文件名，
CLI 的 importArchive(Path) 行为不变。

feat: replace AWS S3 with Azure Blob Storage

Swap boto3/S3 for azure-storage-blob. Same public API (upload_transcript,
upload_recording_from_url, transcript_key, recording_key) so no other code
changes needed. Config vars updated: AWS_* → AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING
+ AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER. All 86 tests pass.

feat: Everbridge-style supply chain proximity intelligence

Layer 1 - Asset Database (config/supply_chain_assets.json):
  - 40 3rd Party Suppliers: Foxconn, Flex, Jabil, Computacenter,
    Targus, Ingram Micro, TD Synnex, Wistron, Quanta, Intel, AMD,
    Samsung, SK Hynix, TSMC, Philtech + component manufacturers
  - 13 Fulfillment & Logistics: YCH Singapore/Hyderabad/Penang,
    DHL Supply Chain, XPO, UPS, FedEx, Geodis, Kuehne+Nagel
  - 25 World Ports: Singapore PSA, Shanghai Yangshan, Shenzhen,
    LA/Long Beach, Rotterdam, Hamburg, Busan, Dubai Jebel Ali +
    all major Dell supply chain ports globally

Layer 2 - Real Distance Engine (Worker.js + generate_reports.py):
  - top10Assets(): ranks nearest 10 across ALL asset types
  - countAssetsByType(): affected count per type
  - Enriches every proximity alert with full supply chain context

Layer 3 - Structured Alert Format (app.js):
  - Everbridge-style cards: Event type | Alert location | Severity
  - Nearest Asset panel: name + type + distance (may be supplier/port)
  - Collapsible Nearest 10 Assets ranked list with type icons
  - Affected Asset Count by type summary

Layer 4 - Event Type Taxonomy (Worker.js + generate_reports.py):
  - Civil Unrest - Planned Strike / Civil Demonstration
  - Natural Disaster - Earthquake/Flood/Cyclone/Wildfire/Tsunami
  - Violence - Airstrike / Terrorism / Armed Conflict
  - Transport/Supply Chain/Infrastructure sub-types
  - Maps all internal categories to Everbridge nomenclature

commit.message:
feat: V6.2 — configurable surrogate gradient slope

- model.py: add surrogate_slope param to SNNClassifier (default 25.0);
  log slope at init; shared across both LIF layers
- config.py: add surrogate_slope field and --surrogate-slope CLI flag
- pipeline.py: pass surrogate_slope to model constructor; persist in
  pipeline_params.json; backward-compatible load (default 25.0)
- run_puhti_subject.sh: revert lr-scheduler to none (V6.1 rejected);
  set surrogate-slope 50 for V6.2 pilot

Slope=50 is a sharper sigmoid approximation than the default 25 —
closer to the true step function, potentially improving gradient
signal through the LIF surrogate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Increase chart label font sizes for better readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit — Italian energy tariff scraper

Full-stack app: FastAPI + async SQLite backend, Playwright SPA scraper,
two-pass LLM extraction (LM Studio / Anthropic), agentic navigator,
market indices (PUN/PSV/TTF), and single-page frontend.

Key features:
- Multi-page LLM-driven navigation with per-source URL budgets
- 2-pass extraction: offer discovery (Pass 1) + structured extraction (Pass 2)
- XHR interception mode (scr_type=spa_xhr) for JS-rendered prices
- Market indices table with GME scraper + manual override API
- fascia_oraria, stima_bolletta_anno, spread_gas fields
- Improved error diagnostics for wizard-gated prices
- Frontend Explorer with correct field names and full data model

feat: Phase 2 - orange grade, reviews, chat, hi webhook auto-dispatch

1. Orange grade support:
   - Responder registration with grade selection (green/orange)
   - Grade-based hourly rate (green 25k, orange 40k, red 80k)
   - Grade filter in matching (orange requests match orange+red responders)
   - Grade badge display (emoji color-coded)

2. Reviews/ratings (bilateral):
   - POST /api/reviews — create review after completion
   - GET /api/reviews/:matchId — get reviews for match
   - Auto-update responder average rating
   - Star rating UI + comment on RequestStatus and MatchDetail

3. Real-time chat:
   - POST /api/chat/:matchId — send message (500 char limit)
   - GET /api/chat/:matchId?after=N — poll new messages (3s interval)
   - ChatPanel component on both requester and responder views
   - onda_messages D1 table

4. hi.genomic.cc webhook auto-dispatch:
   - Event-type to urgency mapping (fall/fire=emergency, intrusion/wander=urgent)
   - Auto-match nearby responders on webhook
   - Grade requirement by event type (fall→orange, others→green)
   - facility_name + detail in description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: RankMath meta push + FAQ schema injection + content freshness signal

Meta Tags & RankMath:
- pushRankMathMeta() — writes rank_math_title, rank_math_description,
  rank_math_focus_keyword via WP REST API /wp/v2/posts/{id} meta payload
- POST /api/optimizer/:pageId/push-meta — AI generates meta + auto-pushes to RankMath
- MetaTagsPanel.tsx — editable title/desc with char counters, copy buttons, Push to RankMath button

FAQ Schema (JSON-LD):
- extractFAQSchema() — parses h3+p, dt+dd, strong+p FAQ patterns from optimized HTML
- POST /api/optimizer/:pageId/push-schema — generates schema.org FAQPage + injects
  <script type='application/ld+json'> into WP post content (idempotent, replaces old block)
- SchemaPanel.tsx — generate preview + one-click inject to WordPress

Content Freshness:
- GET /api/pages/freshness/:siteId — urgency: urgent/high/medium/fresh based on
  days since last optimization + keyword position change (prev_position - position)
- /dashboard/freshness page — summary cards, filterable page list, 'Optimize' CTAs
- Freshness alert on optimizer page — shows warning if content is 60+ days old
- Sidebar: added Content Freshness nav item

commit.message: fix: show club name fallback when badge image fails to load Adds onError handler to badge tags so broken/404 badge URLs fall back to the club name text display instead of showing nothing. Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context)

perf: save per-fold confusion matrices to disk, skip re-inference in aggregate

run_train now saves cm_fp32.npy and cm_int8.npy alongside each fold's
artifacts. run_aggregate loads and sums these files instead of re-loading
MOABB data, re-running the preprocessing pipeline, and re-running model
inference for every fold — reducing aggregate runtime from ~10 min to
under a second.

  regulatory events, viewership, show premieres
- API timeout: 12s → 15s for larger page fetches
